Hi, I'm Priscilla Chok! 👋

I am a Computer Science graduate specializing in data analytics and software development. I am proficient in Python, R, Java, C++, SQL, and web technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript), and I develop data-driven solutions, dashboards, and web applications that deliver real-world impact.

View Resume

Projects

Massage Website

Built a responsive massage business website using Google Sites, integrating Google Analytics for traffic insights and Google Ads to support marketing campaigns and increase online visibility.

View Site

Easybank Landing Page

A responsive, modern landing page built with HTML and CSS, showcasing clean design, structured sections, and visual hierarchy. Focused on layout, responsiveness, and aesthetic polish, this project highlights frontend design skills without functional interactivity.

View Project

Food Ordering System

A fully functional web app developed collaboratively, with a focus on frontend design and my contribution to the backend. Users can browse menus, place orders, and view summaries, showcasing responsive UI, dynamic functionality, and teamwork.

View Project
